channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Aditi's Journey: Memories and Haunting from Bangladesh to Kolkata
item.description: The excerpt from 'Whispering Waves', translated from Bengali by Madhura Bhattacharya, narrates the story of Aditi, who moves from Bangladesh to Kolkata, while grappling with haunting memories of her s...

item.title: Lily Quigley drafted by Gold Coast Suns in inaugural AFLW pre-season draft
item.description: Eighteen-year-old Lily Quigley from Canberra has achieved a major milestone in her sporting career after being selected by the Gold Coast Suns as the first pick in the inaugural AFLW pre-season draft....

item.title: Metropolitan Police investigate deliberate fire at former East London synagogue
item.description: A fire at the former East London Central Synagogue in Whitechapel is being treated as a suspected arson and is under investigation by the Metropolitan Police's counter-terrorism unit. The incident occ...

item.title: Israeli Court Prolongs Detention of Foreign Activists from Gaza Flotilla
item.description: An Israeli court in Ashkelon has extended the detention of two foreign activists, Spanish national Saif Abu Keshek and Brazilian Thiago Avila, for six more days. The activists were part of a Gaza-boun...

item.title: Bangsamoro Parliament proposes temporary halt on P10 port fee to aid seafarers
item.description: COTABATO CITY — A group of five lawmakers in the 80-member Bangsamoro Parliament has filed a resolution requesting a temporary suspension of the P10 terminal fee imposed on boat passengers by the Bang...

item.title: Asian markets dip amid rising US-Iran tensions and oil volatility
item.description: Asian stock markets declined on Tuesday as rising tensions between the US and Iran sparked fears about the fragile ceasefire concerning the Strait of Hormuz. The downturn affected major markets includ...

item.title: Ilocos Norte Launches Province-Led Solar Rooftop Program for Households
item.description: The Provincial Government of Ilocos Norte, in partnership with ACEN and GCash, has initiated the Ilocos Norte Solar Rooftop Campaign, the first local government-led effort in the Philippines to provid...

item.title: Review finds systemic failures and misogyny in PSNI following Katie Simpson's death
item.description: A review into the handling of Katie Simpson's death has revealed systemic failures and entrenched misogyny within the Police Service of Northern Ireland (PSNI). Katie Simpson, a 21-year-old showjumper...

item.title: Erwin Tulfo requests survey firms to stop contacting him
item.description: Broadcaster and public figure Erwin Tulfo has publicly asked survey companies to stop including him in their polling efforts. In a statement shared recently, Tulfo expressed frustration at the constan...

item.title: Nova Scotia Care Company Workers Misled About Taxable Wages Amid CRA Audit
item.description: Workers at Arden Professional Client Care, a company contracted by the Nova Scotia government to support vulnerable adults and children, have expressed concern and confusion after learning their pay m...

item.title: Supreme Court Holds That Bail Should Be Considered When Right to Speedy Trial Under Article 21 is Violated
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has ruled that bail must be considered for an accused person if the right to speedy trial guaranteed under Article 21 of the Constitution is violated due to undue delay in t...

item.title: How to Save on Travel with TravelUp Discount Codes and Deals
item.description: TravelUp provides a wide range of holiday planning options, including over 300,000 hotels worldwide and flights with major airlines such as British Airways, Virgin Atlantic, Qatar Airways, and Singapo...

item.title: Coinbase cuts 14% of workforce to reduce costs and expand AI-driven operations
item.description: Coinbase announced plans to lay off approximately 700 employees, representing about 14% of its workforce, as part of a broader restructuring effort aimed at improving efficiency and adapting to ongoin...

item.title: Raffy and Erwin Tulfo Confirm No Plans for Higher Office in 2028
item.description: Senator Erwin Tulfo clarified that he and his brother Raffy Tulfo will not be running for higher offices in the 2028 national and local elections. This statement came after a Pulse Asia survey showed ...

item.title: BJP Set to Form Government in West Bengal, CM Likely to Be Decided on May 9
item.description: In a historic political shift, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has achieved a decisive victory in West Bengal, winning 206 seats out of 294 and ending the 15-year rule of the Trinamool Congress (TMC)...

item.title: Lawyer Moves to Court to Block Parliament from Reviewing Uhuru Kenyatta's Retirement Benefits
item.description: A Nairobi-based lawyer, Shadrack Wambui from Sheria Mtaani, has filed a petition in court seeking urgent intervention to stop Parliament from reviewing and possibly changing the retirement benefits of...

item.title: Supreme Court Confirms No Disbarment for Batangas Representative Gerville Luistro
item.description: A false claim circulated on social media stated that the Supreme Court had disbarred Batangas 2nd District Representative Gerville Luistro. The claim emerged on April 28, 2026, coinciding with the Hou...

item.title: Kenya and Tanzania leaders push for stronger cooperation and trade
item.description: Kenya President William Ruto has praised Tanzanian President Samia Suluhu Hassan for her strong leadership and efforts to boost cooperation between Kenya and Tanzania. Speaking in Dodoma during an imp...

item.title: Albert delos Santos breaks junior world record and wins multiple golds at IWF Championships
item.description: Albert delos Santos, a rising Filipino weightlifting talent, made history at the International Weightlifting Federation (IWF) World Junior Championships by setting a new junior world record and winnin...

item.title: Potential Impact of RBA Rate Hike on Australian Homeowners and Borrowers
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) is expected to announce a possible cash rate hike on Tuesday, which would mark the third increase this year. Economists predict a rise of 0.25 percentage points, ta...
